name: mrw-approval-serve
description: Thread B browser approval — a token-less, push-less HTTP front end that renders the broker's ground-truth ApprovalView and relays sha-typed approve/decline decisions to the broker over a SEPARATE unix socket (approve-sock). Never holds BROKER_GITHUB_TOKEN; never pushes; the broker re-verifies every submitted sha in-process regardless of what this process renders or forwards.
